title: sarothamnus scoparius var. albiflorus
intro: Sarothamnus scoparius var. albiflorus, also known as white broom or white gorse, is a flowering plant that belongs to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of white broom include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. White broom can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
